name: ExtensionArtifactAssessment_ApprovalDate
title: R5: When the artifact assessment was approved by publisher (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ArtifactAssessment.approvalDate` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ArtifactAssessment.approvalDate` 0..1 `date`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `ArtifactAssessment.approvalDate` 0..1 `date`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ArtifactAssessment.approvalDate` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ArtifactAssessment` is not mapped.
Element `ArtifactAssessment.approvalDate` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: When the artifact assessment was approved by publisher (new)
element.comment:
Element `ArtifactAssessment.approvalDate` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ArtifactAssessment` is not mapped.
Element `ArtifactAssessment.approvalDate` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
The 'date' element may be more recent than the approval date because of minor changes or editorial corrections.

element.short: When the artifact assessment was approved by publisher
element.definition: The date on which the resource content was approved by the publisher. Approval happens once when the content is officially approved for usage.
element.comment: The 'date' element may be more recent than the approval date because of minor changes or editorial corrections.
